task_completion.description: Create the four required layers with specified colors
task_completion.visual_evidence: The LibreCAD Layer List panel shows four new layers: 'DBOX' (Cyan), 'TRENCHES' (Green), 'PIPES' (Red), and 'LABELS' (Yellow).

task_completion.description: Draw the Distribution Box on the DBOX layer
task_completion.visual_evidence: A cyan square (representing the 24x24 D-Box) is visible on the canvas, positioned to the left of the origin.

task_completion.description: Draw three parallel Absorption Trenches on the TRENCHES layer
task_completion.visual_evidence: Three long, parallel green rectangles are visible on the canvas to the right of the D-Box, aligned vertically with equal spacing.

task_completion.description: Draw connecting pipe lines on the PIPES layer
task_completion.visual_evidence: Three red lines are visible starting from the right edge of the cyan D-Box and connecting to the left edges of the three green trenches.

task_completion.description: Add text labels for the components on the LABELS layer
task_completion.visual_evidence: Yellow text labels reading 'D-BOX', 'TRENCH 1', 'TRENCH 2', and 'TRENCH 3' are visible on the canvas near their respective geometric shapes.

task_completion.description: Save the completed drawing as septic_plan.dxf
task_completion.visual_evidence: The LibreCAD window title bar displays 'septic_plan.dxf' or a save dialog confirms the file is being saved to the /home/ga/Documents/LibreCAD/ directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the LibreCAD graphical interface to create the drawing
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent actively clicking tools, entering coordinates in the LibreCAD command line, and interacting with the canvas, rather than running a script in the terminal.
Sequential screenshots show the step-by-step addition of layers, shapes, and text, rather than the complete drawing appearing instantly from a pre-existing file.

integrity.description: The agent did not generate the DXF file using a text editor
integrity.visual_evidence: No text editors (like nano, vim, or gedit) are shown editing raw DXF syntax to bypass the CAD software.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating a LibreCAD drawing saved to /home/ga/Documents/LibreCAD/septic_plan.dxf. Required layers are DBOX (Cyan), TRENCHES (Green), PIPES (Red), and LABELS (Yellow). The D-Box is a 24x24 square centered at (-48, 0). There are three 600x36 trenches with left edges at X=48 and Y centers at 108, 0, and -108. Three pipes connect the D-Box outlet at (-36, 0) to the center-left of each trench at (48, 108), (48, 0), and (48, -108). Labels 'D-BOX', 'TRENCH 1', 'TRENCH 2', and 'TRENCH 3' must be present. Note: The environment defaults to millimeters, so the agent must configure units to inches (Options -> Current Drawing Preferences) for accurate dimensions, otherwise the task fails.
